title: Clean announce codec (Rust+Python)
description: Align rust/lichen-core/src/announce.rs and python/src/lichen/announce/messages.py with spec/05-routing.md:9, test vectors. Remove any remaining artifacts. Ensure exact match to pseudocode and independent oracles. no_std compliance.
close_reason: Cleaned redundant flags field (merge artifact), aligned structs/parsers/serializers/signed_data with spec pseudocode §9.3 and independent oracles in generate.py + test vectors. no_std compliant, removed dead field copies in tests. Exact byte match for announce_min and ccp9 vectors.
